description: Agilent (Hewlett-Packard) 54845A Infiniium digital oscilloscope. Bandwidth 1.5 GHz; 4 analog channels. Member of the Infiniium 548xx series; controlled by SCPI commands over GPIB (IEEE 488.2) or LAN.
source: Infiniium Oscilloscopes Programmer's Quick Reference Guide (publication 54810-97065, Feb 2001) + Infiniium Oscilloscopes Programmer's Reference (standard 548xx SCPI command set)

identity.description: Standard IEEE 488.2 identification query; returns manufacturer, model (54845A), serial number and firmware revision.

commands.name: idn
commands.description: Query the oscilloscope identification string (manufacturer, model, serial number, firmware revision).

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Reset the oscilloscope to its default (factory) configuration.

commands.name: opc
commands.description: Set the operation complete bit in the standard event status register when all pending operations complete; the query form returns 1 when all operations are finished.

commands.name: cls
commands.description: Clear the status data structures, the device-defined error queue and the request-for-OPC flag.

commands.name: ese
commands.description: Set or query the standard event status enable register mask.

parameters.name: <mask>
parameters.range: 0 to 255 (integer enabling bits in the Standard Event Status Enable register)

commands.name: sre
commands.description: Set or query the service request enable register mask.

parameters.name: <mask>
parameters.range: 0 to 255 (integer enabling bits in the Service Request Enable register)

commands.name: stb
commands.description: Query the status byte register.

commands.name: esr
commands.description: Query the standard event status register.

commands.name: trg
commands.description: Trigger command equivalent to a group execute trigger; starts an acquisition when armed.

commands.name: wai
commands.description: Wait until all pending device operations complete before executing subsequent commands.

commands.name: save_setup
commands.description: Save the current oscilloscope setup to the specified save/recall register.

commands.name: recall_setup
commands.description: Recall a previously saved oscilloscope setup from the specified register.

commands.name: autoscale
commands.description: Automatically configure the vertical, horizontal and trigger controls to display the input signals.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Start repetitive acquisitions (run mode).

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop acquiring data; the displayed waveform is the last acquired record.

commands.name: single
commands.description: Arm the oscilloscope for a single acquisition.

commands.name: digitize
commands.description: Acquire a waveform on the specified source(s) using the current acquisition settings, then stop; prepares data for a :WAVeform:DATA? read.

parameters.name: <source>
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n>|FUNCtion<n>|WMEMory<n>} (one or more, comma separated); n = 1 to 4

commands.name: aer
commands.description: Query the arm event register; returns 1 if the trigger has armed since the last read.

commands.name: ter
commands.description: Query the trigger event register; returns 1 if a trigger has occurred since the last read.

commands.name: system_error
commands.description: Query the next entry in the error queue (error number and message).

commands.name: system_header
commands.description: Enable or disable the inclusion of the command header in query responses, or query its state.

commands.name: system_longform
commands.description: Enable or disable long-form keywords in query responses, or query its state.

commands.name: acquire_mode
commands.description: Set or query the acquisition sampling mode.

commands.name: acquire_average
commands.description: Enable or disable averaging acquisition, or query its state.

commands.name: acquire_count
commands.description: Set or query the number of averages used when averaging is enabled.

commands.name: acquire_points
commands.description: Set or query the number of points (memory depth) acquired per channel.

parameters.name: <points>
parameters.range: 16 to 32768 (4-channel real-time) up to 65536 (2-channel); see manual Points Value Ranges

commands.name: acquire_srate
commands.description: Set or query the acquisition sample rate.

parameters.name: <rate>
parameters.range: Floating-point sample rate (samples per second); valid rates depend on timebase and channel count

commands.name: acquire_interpolate
commands.description: Enable or disable sin(x)/x interpolation between sample points, or query its state.

commands.name: channel_display
commands.description: Turn the display of the specified channel on or off, or query its state.

commands.name: channel_scale
commands.description: Set or query the vertical scale (volts per division) of the specified channel.

parameters.name: <scale>
parameters.range: Real number; volts per division (depends on attenuation factor)

commands.name: channel_range
commands.description: Set or query the full-scale vertical range of the specified channel (eight divisions).

parameters.name: <range>
parameters.range: Real number; full-scale volts across all eight divisions (depends on attenuation factor)

commands.name: channel_offset
commands.description: Set or query the vertical offset (voltage at the centre of the screen) of the specified channel.

parameters.name: <offset>
parameters.range: Real number; offset voltage (range depends on vertical scale and attenuation)

commands.name: channel_coupling
commands.description: Set or query the input coupling and impedance of the specified channel.

parameters.name: <coupling>
parameters.range: {DC|DC50|DCFifty|LFReject} (1 MOhm DC, 50 Ohm DC, or AC/low-frequency reject)

commands.name: channel_probe
commands.description: Set or query the probe attenuation factor of the specified channel.

commands.name: channel_bwlimit
commands.description: Enable or disable the bandwidth limit filter on the specified channel, or query its state.

commands.name: channel_units
commands.description: Set or query the vertical measurement units of the specified channel.

commands.name: timebase_scale
commands.description: Set or query the horizontal scale (seconds per division).

commands.name: timebase_range
commands.description: Set or query the full-scale horizontal range (ten divisions) in seconds.

parameters.name: <range>
parameters.range: Real number; full-scale seconds across all ten divisions

commands.name: timebase_position
commands.description: Set or query the horizontal position (time of the trigger reference point relative to the display).

commands.name: timebase_reference
commands.description: Set or query the horizontal reference point (where the time position is measured from).

commands.name: timebase_delay
commands.description: Set or query the timebase delay (offset of the trigger point from the horizontal reference).

parameters.name: <delay>
parameters.range: Real number; delay time in seconds

commands.name: trigger_sweep
commands.description: Set or query the trigger sweep mode (how the oscilloscope arms and triggers).

commands.name: trigger_mode
commands.description: Set or query the trigger mode (the type of trigger condition).

commands.name: trigger_edge_source
commands.description: Set or query the source for edge triggering.

commands.name: trigger_edge_slope
commands.description: Set or query the edge slope (rising or falling) used for edge triggering.

commands.name: trigger_level
commands.description: Set or query the trigger threshold voltage level for the specified source.

commands.name: trigger_holdoff
commands.description: Set or query the trigger holdoff time (minimum time between valid triggers).

parameters.name: <time>
parameters.range: Real number; holdoff time (60 ns to 320 ns)

commands.name: measure_source
commands.description: Set or query the default source(s) used by subsequent measurement commands.

parameters.name: <source>
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n>|FUNCtion<n>|WMEMory<n>} (one or two, comma separated); n = 1 to 4

commands.name: measure_vpp
commands.description: Measure and return the peak-to-peak voltage of the specified source.

parameters.name: <source>
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n>|FUNCtion<n>|WMEMory<n>}; n = 1 to 4 (optional; uses default source if omitted)

commands.name: measure_vamplitude
commands.description: Measure and return the amplitude (top minus base) voltage of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_vmax
commands.description: Measure and return the maximum voltage of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_vmin
commands.description: Measure and return the minimum voltage of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_vrms
commands.description: Measure and return the RMS voltage of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_vaverage
commands.description: Measure and return the average voltage of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_frequency
commands.description: Measure and return the frequency of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_period
commands.description: Measure and return the period of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_risetime
commands.description: Measure and return the rise time of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_falltime
commands.description: Measure and return the fall time of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_dutycycle
commands.description: Measure and return the duty cycle (percent) of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_pwidth
commands.description: Measure and return the positive pulse width of the specified source.

commands.name: measure_nwidth
commands.description: Measure and return the negative pulse width of the specified source.

commands.name: waveform_source
commands.description: Set or query the source used by subsequent waveform data and preamble queries.

commands.name: waveform_format
commands.description: Set or query the data encoding format for waveform data transfers.

commands.name: waveform_byteorder
commands.description: Set or query the byte order used for WORD-format waveform data transfers.

commands.name: waveform_points
commands.description: Query the number of points available in the currently selected waveform record.

commands.name: waveform_type
commands.description: Query the acquisition type of the currently selected waveform (e.g. NORMal, AVERage, RAW).

commands.name: waveform_preamble
commands.description: Query the waveform preamble (format, type, points, count and the X/Y scaling factors needed to convert raw data to engineering units).

commands.name: waveform_data
commands.description: Query the waveform data of the currently selected source in the current format (IEEE 488.2 definite-length block for BYTE/WORD).

commands.name: waveform_xincrement
commands.description: Query the time between successive waveform data points (X increment) in seconds.

commands.name: waveform_xorigin
commands.description: Query the X-axis value (time, in seconds) of the first waveform data point.

commands.name: waveform_yincrement
commands.description: Query the voltage value of each quantization level (Y increment) for the selected waveform.

commands.name: waveform_yorigin
commands.description: Query the Y-axis value (voltage) at the centre of the screen for the selected waveform.

commands.name: display_connect
commands.description: Enable or disable connecting (vectoring) waveform data dots on the display, or query its state.

commands.name: display_persistence
commands.description: Set or query the waveform persistence time on the display.
